title: medicago italica subsp. tornata
intro: Medicago italica subsp. tornata, also known as Italian clover or fenugreek, is a legume plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Medicago italica subsp. tornata include lowering cholesterol levels, improving blood sugar control, and reducing symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
